# Vibe Engineering

> Verify It Before Everything.

Vibe Engineering is a sovereign AI building methodology developed by The Pauli Effect / Yappyverse for non-technical creators and AI-assisted product teams.

## Core promise

Use AI speed without surrendering judgment, quality, maintainability, or ownership.

## Eight-stage method

1. Vision
2. Blueprint
3. Build
4. Verify
5. Council
6. Judge
7. Ship
8. Improve

## Release policy

- Vibe Score floor: 8.5/10
- Hard stops: security, reliability, and ownership must each score at least 7/10
- Consequential legal, financial, safety, publishing, and relationship decisions require explicit human approval

## Sovereignty pledge

Once a customer buys a deliverable, the agreed code, data, accounts, workflows, access, and documentation belong to that customer. Fees are for human time and compute, not manufactured dependence.

## Repository documents

- README.md — project overview and quick start
- docs/MANIFESTO.md — principles and moral position
- docs/METHOD.md — complete eight-stage method
- docs/GOVERNANCE.md — Council, Judge, approvals, and release gates
- docs/VIBE-SCORE.md — scoring rubric
- public/vibe-engineering-foundation-prompt.md — free system prompt
